case_title: WORTHAM FAMILY PARTNERSHIP vs. MYRTHIL, ALIX et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORTHAM FAMILY PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORTHAM FAMILY PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1053 BUSH ST, #3, STAYED UNTIL NOV-28-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. SHALL WAIVE RECOVERY OF RENT, IF DEFT. TIMELY VACATES PREMISES; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 28-NOV-94; IF DEFT. COMPLIES PLTF. WILL EXECUTE NECESSARY DOCUMENTS TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ACTION; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
